summary: First end-to-end test of Smart Hospital Management System. Backend: 23/23 pytest cases pass (auth all 4 roles, register, RBAC, admin stats, doctors/receptionists/departments/walk-in CRUD, patient booking + cancel, doctor prescription -> appointment completed, billing CRUD + mark paid, PDF invoice with authorization including patient-only-own + recep-can-access-any). Frontend: admin dashboard renders 4 KPIs + 7-day bar chart with seed values (Patients 4, Doctors 2, Today 3, Revenue $580); patient booking wizard (3 steps) successfully books appointment and navigates to /patient/appointments with 'pending' status; patient cancel works; doctor 'Write prescription' dialog saves and flips appt to 'completed'; receptionist walk-in / billing pages load; logout clears session and redirects to /login.

minor.issue: CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is a spec violation — most browsers will reject preflight when both wildcard origin and credentials are set. Currently works because preview frontend and backend share the same origin via ingress, but will break if accessed cross-origin. Recommend explicit allowed origins.
Filter expression has operator-precedence ambiguity: `ql in name OR ql in description` is parsed as `(ql in name) or ql in description` — semantically OK but lacks parentheses, brittle.

issues: Form inputs (name, email, age, phone, address) are missing data-testid attributes; only structural inputs exist. Adds testing fragility — recommend adding testids like walkin-name, walkin-email, walkin-submit.

KPI testids use kpi-total-patients / kpi-total-doctors / kpi-appointments-today / kpi-revenue (review_request referenced shorter kpi-patients etc.; not a bug, just doc/testid naming mismatch — agent confirmed visually all 4 KPIs render with non-zero values).

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid attributes to /receptionist/walk-in form inputs (walkin-name, walkin-email, walkin-age, walkin-phone, walkin-address, walkin-submit) for E2E test stability.
(Optional) Tighten CORS: replace '*' with explicit frontend origin when allow_credentials=True (or remove credentials wildcard combination).
No functional fixes required — all critical flows verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 870+ lines — works fine but for future maintainability consider splitting routers into modules (auth, appointments, billing, admin).
Seed data is idempotent for admin but skips on any existing doctor — if a future test wipes departments only, seeding won't repopulate them. Acceptable for MVP.
JWT secret is committed in /app/backend/.env (visible). For production it must be rotated and moved to a secret manager.
Billing list filter: line 603 in server.py — boolean precedence: `ql in name or ql in description` should be parenthesised; works today but fragile.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (admin dashboard, patient booking + cancel, doctor prescription, receptionist login + walk-in render, logout)

test_credentials: Confirmed all 6 seed accounts in /app/memory/test_credentials.md work via /api/auth/login: admin@hospital.com/admin123, aarav@hospital.com/doctor123, lina@hospital.com/doctor123, reception@hospital.com/recep123, sara@example.com/patient123, michael@example.com/patient123.
seed_data_creation: Tests created multiple TEST_*-prefixed doctors, departments, receptionists, walk-in patients, appointments, and bills via APIs. Some not cleaned up (e.g. extra appointments for sara/michael, 'TEST bill' for sara). Seed totals after test run: Patients=4 (2 seed + 2 walk-in), bills include $250 TEST bill marked paid. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend file /app/backend/tests/test_hospital_api.py is the regression suite — re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_hospital_api.py -v. Frontend KPI testids on admin dashboard are kpi-total-patients/kpi-total-doctors/kpi-appointments-today/kpi-revenue. Patient booking wizard testids: dep-{id} -> doctor-{id} -> patient-book-date / patient-book-time / patient-book-reason / patient-book-appointment-button. Doctor prescription: write-prescription-{id} -> prescription-medication-input / prescription-notes-input / prescription-save-button. Receptionist /walk-in inputs do NOT have data-testid (only label-based). Sidebar logout uses logout-button testid.
